violations.current_code:
def verify_plan_pause_info_not_displayed(self):
    """Verify plan pause information is not displayed."""
    from playwright.sync_api import expect
    expect(self.plan_pause_info).not_to_be_visible(timeout=10000)
violations.explanation: The method imports 'expect' from playwright.sync_api inside the method body. According to checkpoint F07, imports inside method bodies should be avoided unless pattern-required. For page object methods, expect should be imported at the module level, not inside each method. This pattern is repeated in all verification methods in this file.

fix_details.description: Remove the import statement from inside the method. The expect import should be at module level in the target file pages/print_history_page.py
fix_details.note: This fix applies to all 5 methods that have this import. When merging into print_history_page.py, ensure expect is imported at module level and remove all inline imports.

fix_priority_order.fix_approach: Remove all TODO comments from the test script. These indicate incomplete implementation and should not exist in production code. The comments about GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription_plan and RTP parameters should be removed once the implementation is complete.

Create the GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription_plan(page, tenant_email) helper method to encapsulate the pause plan logic. This method should handle: 1) Getting org token, 2) Accessing Gemini RA, 3) Accessing tenant page, 4) Triggering pause plan action, 5) Verifying pause status. Once created, replace the inline implementation and TODO comments with a single helper method call.

Replace the inline admin interaction sequence (get_org_aware_token, GeminiRAHelper.access, GeminiRAHelper.access_tenant_page) with a single call to GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription_plan(). This consolidates the admin interaction into a helper method following the framework pattern.

Remove the 'from playwright.sync_api import expect' import from inside all 5 verification methods. When merging into pages/print_history_page.py, ensure expect is imported at module level and remove all inline imports from the methods.
Remove the excessive multi-line comment block explaining implementation details for the pause plan action. This verbose comment should be removed once the implementation is complete.
Convert the comment-style documentation at the top of the page additions file into a proper Python triple-quoted docstring. This provides better documentation and follows Python conventions.
